t_bupg.title: Building Upgrade Tool
t_bupg.desc: Improve your structures without tearing them down.
t_bupg.flavor: Allows you to replace an existing structural piece for an advanced version, if you have that item in your inventory. Hold 'R" when holding the tool.

t_mach.title: Machete
t_mach.desc: A heavy duty blade, highly durable but less suitable for skinning.

co_flo.title: Concrete Floor
co_flo.desc: Strong and stable, a floor that endures the worst Icarus can deliver.

t_recb.title: Recurve Bow
t_recb.desc: With higher energy, recurve bows increase range and power.
t_recb.flavor: Originating in ancient Scythia, the recurve bow stores energy more efficiently than a conventional bow, allowing for smaller, more compact weapons with an appreciable improvement in range and stopping power.

c_sres.title: Stamina Restoration Paste
c_sres.desc: A natural stimulant that restores lost stamina.
c_sres.flavor: As countless athletes, party-goers and would-be mystics have noted, the line between natural stimulant and highly addictive narcotic is arbitrary, at best.

radbio.title: Biofuel Radar
radbio.desc: A portable topographical radar unit powered by Biofuel. Nearby Local wildlife become agressive when this is active.
radbio.flavor: Powered by good old Icarus Biofuel.

p_btit.title: Titanium Bolt
p_btit.flavor: "When you've got two tons of polar bear lumbering towards you across the ice, you suddenly realise a bullet's not going to cut it. But a titanium bolt through the eye, that's another story." - Sol Berlinski

iw_hps.title: Refined Wood Halfpieces
iw_hps.desc: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
iw_hps.flavor: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

rainre.title: Rain Reservoir
rainre.desc: A simple and durable way to collect rain water.
rainre.flavor: Water can be consumed directly from the reservoir, or it will refill an equipped container.

iw_doo.title: Interior Wood Door
iw_doo.desc: A light wooden door, best suited to internal use.
iw_doo.flavor: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

al_wan.title: Aluminium Wall Angled
al_wan.flavor: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

p_aste.title: Steel Arrow
p_aste.desc: A stronger arrow head, more durable than flint.
p_aste.flavor: Tempered and fletched, the steel arrow has significant upsides over comparable alternatives.

t_pkni.title: Platinum Knife
t_pkni.desc: A precision blade, stronger than steel.
t_pkni.flavor: Platinum's durablity gives an incredibly accurate, lethal cutting edge.

t_paxe.title: Platinum Axe
t_paxe.desc: An axceedingly reliable, accurate hewing tool.
t_paxe.flavor: "Give me six hours to chop down a tree, I'll spend the first four sharpening the axe" - A. Lincoln

th_hps.title: Thatch Halfpieces
th_hps.desc: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
th_hps.flavor: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

iw_flo.title: Interior Wood Floor
iw_flo.desc: Light wooden flooring, best used internally.
iw_flo.flavor: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

t_ppkx.title: Platinum Pickaxe
t_ppkx.flavor: There is a small, but specific class of problems for which the only solution is a pickaxe.

a_ghic.title: Ghillie Chest Armor
a_ghic.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_ghic.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

c_hres.title: Health Restoration Paste
c_hres.desc: An organic fusion that restores health.
c_hres.flavor: The combination of Icarus's unique conditions and genetic adjustments to plant life has seen the addition of 'useful' methyl chains to many previously innocuous plant-based preparations.

wo_trf.title: Wood Floor Trapdoor
wo_trf.desc: A floorpiece with a hole for a trapdoor.

s_ceme.title: Cement Mixer
s_ceme.flavor: Concrete is composed of two essential elements: aggregate and a cement binder, with ratios depending on the specific design mix. Specialized concrete engineers are rare on Icarus, though.

ltrodb.title: Lightning Rod
ltrodb.desc: Channels lightning strikes safely toward the ground, saving structures from fiery destruction.
ltrodb.flavor: The effect of Minos's gravitational tides on the atmosphere creates extraordinarily powerful electrical storms, making these devices indispensible.

a_cloa.title: Cloth Arm Armor
a_cloa.desc: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

torrag.title: Wood Rag Torch
torrag.desc: An easily crafted source of illumination.
torrag.flavor: An ancient guiding light has found its place on Icarus, to keep the darkness at bay.

gl_wal.title: Glass Wall
gl_wal.desc: A fully transparent, mullioned wall section.
gl_wal.flavor: Throw no stones, but hold 'R' to cycle through variants, such as doorways. Mysteriously, can be repaired with a repair hammer.

fertgr.title: Growth Fertilizer
fertgr.desc: Helps your crops to grow faster

s_cook.title: Cooking Station
s_cook.desc: A stone oven and food preparation station.
s_cook.flavor: While it may not deliver high cuisine, the Cooking Station rewards the attentions of an attentive chef with a swifter, more sustaining food supply.

t_ipkx.title: Iron Pickaxe
t_ipkx.desc: A strong iron pickaxe, for more rapid, reliable mining of basic stone.
t_ipkx.flavor: An enduring if ironic icon of the so-called 'Exotics Rush'.

gl_rco.title: Glass Roof Corner
gl_rco.desc: A transparent insert for angled roofs.

M_cool.title: Cooling Bandage
M_cool.desc: A bandage with a soothing balm to quickly lower temperatures

t_shov.title: Shovel
t_shov.desc: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

al_trd.title: Aluminium Trapdoor
al_trd.flavor: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

a_hunc.title: Hunter Chest Armor
a_hunc.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_hunc.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

t_bspe.title: Bone Spear
t_bspe.desc: A bone blade improves melee and ranged damage.
t_bspe.flavor: As most new arrivals on Icarus realise at some stage, there is a certain elegance to hunting an animal for its bones, in order to craft a more effective weapon to hunt further animals.

al_doo.title: Aluminium Door
al_doo.desc: A rough but resilient corrugated aluminium door.
al_doo.flavor: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

p_afla.title: Flare Arrow
p_afla.desc: Projects your position into the sky.
p_afla.flavor: The lost among us lean heavily on this launchable marker.

s_carp.title: Carpentry Bench
s_carp.desc: Workbench and tools for advanced wooden crafting.
s_carp.flavor: The rapid growth of trees on Icarus makes for noticeably less durable wooden creations.

e_wate.title: Waterwheel Generator
e_wate.desc: A combined wheel and generator, turns fluid motion into angular momentum.
e_wate.flavor: Still one of humanity's greatest ideas.

ecooll.title: Heavy Air Conditioner
ecooll.desc: A powered heat exchange unit for cooling larger areas.

c_ocon.title: Oxygen Consumption Paste
c_ocon.flavor: This preparation reduces the heart rate, dropping oxygen consumption temporarily.

a_furl.title: Fur Leg Armor
a_furl.desc: Heavy, strengthened fur leg armor, warm and moderately protective.

t_cros.title: Crossbow
t_cros.desc: Heavy hitting with a slow reload, so make it count.
t_cros.flavor: 'The first time I held a crossbow, I was confused. How can you feel powerful and so medieval at the same time?' -- Anton Chang

t_mkni.title: Combat Knife
t_mkni.desc: A hardened sheepsfoot blade for the swiftest killing and skinning.

flashl.title: Flashlight
flashl.desc: An LED flashlight for illuminating dark corners.

M_sutu.title: Suture Kit
M_sutu.desc: A basic medical kit for healing deep wounds.
M_sutu.flavor: Whether lightly or deeply wounded, 'Permit the pain to pass over you, and through you.' - Bao Li Wei

t_dsca.title: Deep Mining Ore Scanner
t_dsca.desc: A scanner that can locate various deep ore deposits within the surrounding area
t_dsca.flavor: A truly remarkable piece of equipment.

extbio.title: Biofuel Extractor
extbio.desc: A portable, powered mining unit powered by biofuel for extracting exotics deposits.

g_frag.title: Frag Grenade
g_frag.flavor: Homemade explosives are the best kind.

firepl.title: Fireplace
firepl.desc: Cooks food swiftly and safely. Basically a large enclosed firepit, for a more homely feel.
firepl.flavor: On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.

t_pham.title: Platinum Hammer
t_pham.desc: Light, durable, accurate, but still a hammer.
t_pham.flavor: "On Icarus, you're either the hammer, or the anvil" - Javier Survez

p_apoi.title: Poison Arrow
p_apoi.flavor: Requiring less accuracy, but more patience, the poison arrow brings down quarry slowly, but surely.

a_cloh.title: Cloth Head Armor
a_cloh.desc: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

iw_bea.title: Interior Wood Beam
iw_bea.desc: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
iw_bea.flavor: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

c_sreg.title: Stamina Regeneration Paste
c_sreg.desc: An organic stimulant that accelerates stamina recovery.
c_sreg.flavor: A herbal preparation that acts rapidly on the sympathetic nervous system, increasing noradrenergic activity.

iw_rhf.title: Refined Wood Halfpitches
iw_rhf.flavor: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

wchair.title: Wooden Chair
wchair.flavor: Driven by the demands and scarcity of life on the surface, a recognizable 'Icarus vernacular' has swiftly emerged, spanning many forms of design, with furniture being no exception.

t_sham.title: Steel Hammer
t_sham.desc: The most efficient tool for repairing damaged structures.
t_sham.flavor: The tidal forces of Minos produce exceptionally violent weather on Icarus, its largest moon, which in turn damages even the most robust construction. A steel hammer can even the odds ... a little.

st_fra.title: Stone Frame
st_fra.desc: A heavy stone foundation, extends height and stability of constructions.

m_gunp.title: Gunpowder
m_gunp.desc: Creating and solving problems for over one thousand years.
m_gunp.flavor: 'Not the best we could do, but not the worst either' - Sol Berlinski

kitstv.title: Biofuel Stove
kitstv.flavor: A well-crafted, solidly insulated stove for discerning off-world chefs.

blwall.title: Basic Wall Light
blwall.desc: A wall-mounted lamp, providing wide illumination, needing power.

wo_win.title: Wood Window
wo_win.desc: Open to let Icarus in, close to keep it out.

wbed.title: Wood Bed
wbed.desc: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.
wbed.flavor: Rest, restore energy, respawn as required.

th_ram.title: Thatch Roof/Ramp
th_ram.desc: A light, easily crafted ramp for roofing or access.
th_ram.flavor: Whether you employ this for a roof, or simply for ease of access, the thatch ramp is simple to make and easy to carry, but provides only limited environmental protection.

t_isic.title: Iron Sickle
t_isic.desc: An ancient, but efficient tool for harvesting from nature.
t_isic.flavor: Delivers more resources with each swipe.

t_fwha.title: Fire Whacker
t_fwha.flavor: Discovered in prehistory, the fire whacker represents an effective, if unsophisticated tactic: Attack the flames until they surrender.

wpump.title: Water Pump
wpump.desc: A small, but powerful axial-flow pump useful for creating water networks.

wpipet.title: Water Pipe Tool
wpipet.desc: A tool to help create and connect Water networks.

c_wcon.title: Water Consumption Paste
c_wcon.desc: A natural preparation, temporarily reducing the body's need for water.

p_bcop.title: Copper Bolt
p_bcop.desc: Lightweight and strong, the copper bolt hits hard over distance.

a_furf.title: Fur Feet Armor
a_furf.desc: Heavily insulated fur boots, offering moderate physical protection.

iw_rai.title: Interior Wood Railing
iw_rai.desc: A light wooden railing for internal construction.

wcupbo.title: Wood Cupboard
wcupbo.desc: A place to put necessities ... and the rest.

ecompo.title: Electric Composter
ecompo.desc: Advanced biofuel unit for accelerated production.
ecompo.flavor: An upshot of the Climate Emergency was a focus on efficient, sustainable technology that squeezes every ounce of energy from nature.

s_trop.title: Trophy Bench
s_trop.flavor: Make a record of your victories, because planet is barely aware of you.

s_rdec.title: Rustic Decoration Bench
s_rdec.desc: A bench for crafting items from the Rustic Decor Set
s_rdec.flavor: Pick up a new hobby, today!

a_cloc.title: Cloth Chest Armor
a_cloc.desc: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

a_coma.title: Composite Arms Armor
a_coma.desc: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
a_coma.flavor: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

m_pois.title: Poison Paste
m_pois.desc: A slow-working toxin made from spoiled meat.
m_pois.flavor: 'Life is a slow working poison' - Jean Hurvit

st_flo.title: Stone Floor
st_flo.desc: Roughly hewn flagstones, unlikely to burn.

icratm.title: Medium Interior Wood Crate
icratm.desc: A storage unit for items and gear.

s_potb.title: Potbelly Stove
s_potb.desc: A wrought iron stove for cooking basic meals.
s_potb.flavor: Hearty and filling, the warm meals provided by this stove are the next steps towards culinary perfection.

st_win.title: Reinforced Window
st_win.desc: A braced and bolstered wooden window.

a_polf.title: Polar Bear Feet Armor
a_polf.desc: Highly insulated, lightweight protective fur boots.
a_polf.flavor: Evolved for the most demanding climate on Earth, the polar bear's skin works equally well in the most damaged environment on Icarus.

a_leaf.title: Leather Feet Armor
a_leaf.desc: Roughly made boots, increase temperature and damage resistance.

s_croh.title: Hydroponic Crop Plot
s_croh.desc: An advanced option for the busy farmer. Supports inputs from both Power and Water networks for increased crop growth speed. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
s_croh.flavor: Can be connected to both a water and a power network

a_comc.title: Composite Chest Armor
a_comc.desc: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
a_comc.flavor: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

wlamom.title: Omnidirectional Worklamp
wlamom.desc: A basic lamp for illuminating a large area.

iw_trd.title: Interior Wood Trapdoor
iw_trd.flavor: Attaches to a floor trapdoor structure. Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

t_spkx.title: Steel Pickaxe
t_spkx.desc: Tempered steel, suitable for even the toughest of metals.
t_spkx.flavor: When first landing on Icarus prospectors quickly discovered the need for stronger metals to deal with the local ore.

a_coml.title: Composite Legs Armor
a_coml.desc: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
a_coml.flavor: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

p_asto.title: Stone Arrow
p_asto.desc: The most basic version of an ancient weapon.
p_asto.flavor: Attempts to redesign the planet failed, but the terrazone nonetheless has a ready supply of raw ingredients for this 'rock on a stick'.

firepi.title: Firepit
firepi.desc: A large, stone-lined pit for swift cooking and heating.
firepi.flavor: Flashroast a steak or an entire mammoth forequarter.

a_leal.title: Leather Leg Armor
a_leal.desc: Simple chausses, improving insulation and damage resistance.

st_rhf.title: Stone Halfpitches
st_rhf.flavor: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

m_carp.title: Carbon Paste
m_carp.desc: A carbon-based admixture used in advanced constructions.

t_tsic.title: Titanium Sickle
t_tsic.desc: A resilient version of an antique design.
t_tsic.flavor: Sharper and stronger, it swings further, delivering more resources with each swipe.

ewire.title: Electricity Tool
ewire.desc: A tool to help create and connect Electricity networks.

M_bthp.title: Blood Thinning Paste
M_bthp.desc: A folk remedy for diminishing the effects of concussions and contusions.

co_ram.title: Concrete Roof/Ramp
co_ram.desc: A high strength slope for roofing, supports great weight.

t_csca.title: Cave Scanner
t_csca.desc: A scanner that can locate caves within the surrounding area. Right click to toggle audible beeping.
t_csca.flavor: Making life easier, one piece of technology at a time.

co_fra.title: Concrete Frame
co_fra.desc: The strongest, most stable foundation for any structure.

m_cbon.title: Crushed Bone
m_cbon.flavor: Highly ground bone creates a useful ingredient for a range of concoctions.

wo_rco.title: Wood Roof Corner
wo_rco.desc: A roughly cut insert for angled roofs.

th_wal.title: Thatch Wall
th_wal.desc: Lightweight walls, doorways and windows (Hold 'R' for variants).
th_wal.flavor: Simple to craft and plentiful, thatch construction provides rapid shelter to those on the move, or in need of rapid, disposable protection.

c_scon.title: Stamina Consumption Paste
c_scon.desc: A biotic compound that slows stamina loss temporarily.
c_scon.flavor: The time-jarring effects of exotics find their influence in many subtle, poorly understood ways on Icarus.

m_rope.title: Rope
m_rope.desc: Remains one of humanity's greatest inventions.
m_rope.flavor: A central element in crafting various construction materials and equipment.

brazie.title: Brazier
brazie.desc: An easily crafted, open source of light.

lthdoo.title: Leather Curtain Door
lthdoo.flavor: A door for those unimpressed by hinges and handles.

fireex.title: Fire Extinguisher
fireex.desc: A canister of compressed flame-extinguishing gel.

co_trd.title: Heavy Trapdoor
co_trd.flavor: May be attached to a floorpiece with a trapdoor accessway.

edehum.title: Electric Dehumidifier
edehum.desc: Diminishes such health risks as pneumonia, while also seeming to dispel cave worms.
edehum.flavor: Whether cave worms are offended by the sudden aridity it produces, or the high pitched whine, research is yet to confirm.

s_herb.title: Herbalism Bench
s_herb.flavor: Once the realm of witches and shaman, herbalism offers useful wisdom to those who can discern basic science from hocus pocus.

st_trd.title: Reinforced Trapdoor
st_trd.desc: A braced and bolstered wooden trapdoor.
st_trd.flavor: May be attached to a floorpiece with a trapdoor accessway.

a_pola.title: Polar Bear Arm Armor
a_pola.desc: Tough and lightweight fur gloves offering extreme protection against low temperatures.
a_pola.flavor: Skinning polar bears has been illegal to everyone except Inuit hunters for centuries on Earth. On Icarus, there is no such prohibition.

a_ghif.title: Ghillie Feet Armor
a_ghif.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_ghif.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

radele.title: Electric Radar
radele.desc: A portable topographical radar unit powered by Electricity, angers local wildlife when active.
radele.flavor: Connect this baby up to a generator and you are good to go.

s_skin.title: Skinning Bench
s_skin.desc: Fully processes animal carcasses for more resources.
s_skin.flavor: As any hunter knows, preparing an animal can be a slow, messy, wasteful task. The right tools make all the difference.

wcrats.title: Small Wood Crate
wcrats.desc: A modest wooden crate for storing small items.

oxiteb.title: Oxidizer
oxiteb.desc: A simple device for processing oxite into oxygen.
oxiteb.flavor: The oxidizer is a slow, unpowered device that uses mechanical pressure to crush oxite, then store the resulting oxygen. Once the balloon begins to fill, consume oxygen from it directly.

icrats.title: Small Interior Wood Crate
icrats.desc: A small storage unit for items.

wo_bea.title: Wood Beam
wo_bea.desc: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
wo_bea.flavor: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

iw_wal.title: Interior Wood Wall
iw_wal.desc: A light wooden wall, best used internally.
iw_wal.flavor: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

M_btht.title: Blood Thinning Tonic
M_btht.desc: An effective remedy for relieving concussions and contusions.
M_btht.flavor: Voyagers to Icarus have found themselves forced to ressurect a range of folk treatments and traditional medicines.

kitstg.title: Kitchen Storage Block
kitstg.desc: A compact module for all your kitchen storage needs.
kitstg.flavor: For the demanding Icarus ingredient hoarder, a small module with 40 storage slots.

dmdbio.title: Biofuel Deep-Mining Drill
dmdbio.desc: A biofuel-powered drill capable of mining ore trapped deep under the surface.
dmdbio.flavor: Slow progress, but it's worth it

p_acar.title: Carbon Arrow
p_acar.desc: Strength and lightness combined in one hard-hitting package.

t_mspe.title: Composite Spear
t_mspe.desc: Low weight, high strength, extreme damage.
t_mspe.flavor: Bringing two thousand years of materials technology to a sharp stick, the composite spear is lethal at long range or close quarters.

s_maso.title: Masonry Bench
s_maso.desc: Tools for working and shaping stone.
s_maso.flavor: The art of stonework is untouched by the distance between worlds.

m_doub.title: Bread Dough
m_doub.desc: Makes bread, just add to a fire.

c_hbuf.title: Health Buff Paste
c_hbuf.desc: An organic preparation that temporarily increases health.
c_hbuf.flavor: Like so many things on Icarus, the exact ingredients would probably render this concoction illegal on Earth.

a_huna.title: Hunter Arms Armor
a_huna.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_huna.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

a_fura.title: Fur Arm Armor
a_fura.desc: Heavy fur gloves, extremely warm with moderate physical protection.

s_furs.title: Stone Furnace
s_furs.desc: A simple stone furnace for smelting iron and copper.
s_furs.flavor: Bronze-age technology, spread to the stars.

t_bsic.title: Bone Sickle
t_bsic.flavor: The falk or grasshook is a harvesting tool of old, a symbol of labor, and weapon of disgruntled serfdom.

s_crop.title: Wood Crop Plot
s_crop.desc: A general-purpose planter bed for your crops Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants..
s_crop.flavor: A raised planting bed brings the food to you, slowly.

e_sola.title: Solar Panel
e_sola.desc: This solar panel needs to be in direct sunlight to create power, best deployed in a large, open area.
e_sola.flavor: As effective under this star as any other.

M_bthx.title: Blood Thinning Pill
M_bthx.desc: A potent preventative for concussions and contusions.
M_bthx.flavor: Off-label and off-planet, this one doesn't come with any warnings. So it's probably safe.

M_heat.title: Heat Bandage
M_heat.desc: Cloth bandages impregnated with a warming salve, for treating frostbite.

hedgem.title: Medium Wood Hedgehog
hedgem.desc: A medium sized hedgehog-style defensive structure.
hedgem.flavor: Hedgehogs may have been left on Earth but the lessons they tought will serve us well on Icarus.

M_abip.title: Antibiotic Paste
M_abip.desc: Reduces the effects of food poisoning, and other low grade infections.
M_abip.flavor: A natural antibacterial agent that diminishes the impact of afflictions such as infected wounds and pnuemonia.

t_ispe.title: Iron Spear
t_ispe.desc: An iron spearhead, improving defensive power and range.
t_ispe.flavor: 'I throw a spear into the darkness. That is intuition. Then I must send an army into the darkness to find the spear. That is intellect.' -- Ingmar Bergman

c_hreg.title: Health Regeneration Paste
c_hreg.desc: A herbal confection that speeds healing.
c_hreg.flavor: The lily's high concentration of bioactive ingredients is thought to inhibit the reuptake of certain cytochromes, briefly flooding your body with oxidating enzymes.

t_brif.title: Bolt Action Rifle
t_brif.desc: A single-shot bolt action, packs a punch.
t_brif.flavor: Despite limited metallurgic and gunsmithing resources, First Cohort prospectors have managed to design a better-than-serviceable, true-aiming hunting rifle.

co_win.title: Heavy Glass Window
co_win.desc: A heavy duty, highly durable window.

g_smok.title: Smoke Grenade
g_smok.desc: A canister grenade, used for drawing attention or concealing.

th_rco.title: Thatch Roof Corner
th_rco.desc: A lightweight insert for angled roofs.

co_trf.title: Concrete Floor Trapdoor
co_trf.desc: Concrete floor with space for a trapdoor.

al_rco.title: Aluminium Roof Corner
al_rco.desc: A strong, lightweight insert for angled roofs.

t_lonb.title: Longbow
t_lonb.desc: A powerful, but heavy long-range weapon.
t_lonb.flavor: Xeno-biologists hurriedly altered the genes of the tree from which this weapon is made, so that it might thrive on Icarus, never imagining that one day, a bow would be fashioned from it.

m_elec.title: Electronics
m_elec.desc: A modular control unit, adaptable to most I/Os.

a_hunf.title: Hunter Feet Armor
a_hunf.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_hunf.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

wo_flo.title: Wood Floor
wo_flo.desc: Rugged timber flooring, stronger if supported by beams.
wo_flo.flavor: Durable if rudimentary flooring, prone to damage by Icarus's heavier weather. Notably prone to fire in lightning storms. Wooden structures can be repaired with a repair hammer.

e_biof.title: Biofuel Generator
e_biof.desc: An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.
e_biof.flavor: Literally or figuratively, we've come a long way from the Faraday Disc.

t_wbow.title: Wood Bow
t_wbow.desc: A primitive bow with limited range and durability.
t_wbow.flavor: A more rudimentary bow is hard to imagine, but will prove lethal in steady, patient hands.

backpl.title: Leather Backpack
backpl.desc: A tough leather backpack that increases inventory space, carry weight capacity and reduces the weight of ore.
backpl.flavor: Sol Berlinski, now Lagos Unit dispatcher on Ceres Station, claims the design of the 'quietly iconic' prospector's basic backpack was taught to him personally by Mo Chou.

wo_doo.title: Wood Door
wo_doo.flavor: Doors can be attached to doorways, once built.

wo_lad.title: Wood Ladder
wo_lad.desc: A rudimentary ladder, lashed together with fiber.

st_rco.title: Stone Roof Corner
st_rco.desc: A robust insert for angled roofs.

s_mpro.title: Material Processor
s_mpro.desc: Swiftly craft advanced ingredients and resources.

a_comh.title: Composite Head Armor
a_comh.desc: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
a_comh.flavor: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

th_bea.title: Thatch Beam
th_bea.desc: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
th_bea.flavor: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

co_bea.title: Concrete Beam
co_bea.desc: Anchors structures to the ground for extremely high building.
co_bea.flavor: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor. Increasing the quantity of beams at lower levels will increase build height even further.

t_bkni.title: Bone Knife
t_bkni.desc: Stronger, lighter and sharper than its stone cousin.
t_bkni.flavor: Did any UDA xenobiologist ever foresee that the bones of animals they adapted for life on Icarus would one day be used to fashion rudimentary hunting weapons?

s_furc.title: Concrete Furnace
s_furc.desc: An insulated, high-temperature furnace for smelting a wide range of materials including steel.
s_furc.flavor: Icarus's oxygen levels may slow combustion, but ceramic insulation produces temperatures sufficient for smelting more advanced alloys.

t_brep.title: Wood Repair Hammer
t_brep.desc: Maintain your structures against the wrath of Icarus.
t_brep.flavor: Quickly beat dislodged planks back into place with this basic repair tool.

wlamdi.title: Directional Worklamp
wlamdi.desc: A basic lamp for illuminating a large area.

a_ghia.title: Ghillie Arms Armor
a_ghia.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_ghia.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

t_tpkx.title: Titanium Pickaxe
t_tpkx.desc: An extremely strong, lightweight mining tool.

t_iaxe.title: Iron Axe
t_iaxe.desc: An iron axe, for swifter felling and hewing.
t_iaxe.flavor: 'Technological progress is like an axe in the hands of a pathological criminal.' -- Albert Einstein

st_hps.title: Stone Halfpieces
st_hps.desc: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
st_hps.flavor: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

a_ghih.title: Ghillie Head Armor
a_ghih.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_ghih.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

t_sspe.title: Steel Spear
t_sspe.desc: A light, strong traditional spear design that holds its edge.
t_sspe.flavor: The word 'spear' has descended to us through the ages largely unchanged.

a_ghil.title: Ghillie Leg Armor
a_ghil.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_ghil.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

t_wspe.title: Wood Spear
t_wspe.desc: Simple to make, easy to break.
t_wspe.flavor: An effective defensive weapon, and erratic low range projectile, rapidly surpassed by improved versions.

fertyd.title: High-Quality Fertilizer
fertyd.desc: Increases the yield of your crops
fertyd.flavor: Fertilizer is a multivitamin for your plants

a_polc.title: Polar Bear Chest Armor
a_polc.desc: Strong, lightweight body armor with extreme protection against cold.
a_polc.flavor: Evolved for the most demanding climate on Earth, the polar bear's skin works equally well in the most damaged environment on Icarus.

t_hrif.title: Hunting Rifle
t_hrif.desc: A semi-automatic rifle, ideal for big game hunting.
t_hrif.flavor: An ancient hand-wrought weapon design, adapted to a new frontier.

s_kita.title: Advanced Kitchen Bench
s_kita.desc: A full food and herbal preparation area.

icebox.title: Ice Box
icebox.desc: Stores food at low temperatures when supplied with ice.
icebox.flavor: The insulated icebox arrests food decay, as well as slowing the melting of ice itself. Has 10 storage slots.

oxited.title: Oxite Dissolver
oxited.desc: A more efficient oxidizer for processing oxite into oxygen.
oxited.flavor: Place oxite and an appropriate container into the dissolver to start filling it. Requires sulfur for fuel.

a_poll.title: Polar Bear Leg Armor
a_poll.desc: Lightweight fur armor for the lower body, offering exceptional insulation.
a_poll.flavor: Once a warm high altitude desert, the arctic's temperature dropped in the aftermath of failed terraforming, leaving a frigid wasteland of which the polar bear is now the unchallenged apex predator.

a_hunh.title: Hunter Head Armor
a_hunh.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_hunh.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

t_saxe.title: Steel Axe
t_saxe.desc: A steel axe, for swifter felling and hewing.
t_saxe.flavor: Steel of this quality would be an embarrassment to any industry on Earth, but on Icarus remains a minor miracle.

st_wal.title: Stone Wall
st_wal.desc: Build stronger structures, unthreatened by fire.

fuelca.title: Biofuel Can
fuelca.desc: Canister for biofuel storage, which can be filled at a composter.

t_tspe.title: Titanium Spear
t_tspe.desc: A powerful, precise projectile and combat weapon.
t_tspe.flavor: Extremely strong and lightweight, the titanium spear is a devastating hunting and protective tool in well-trained hands.

s_car4.title: Electric Carpentry Bench
s_car4.desc: Powered workbench and machine tools for advanced woodworking.

c_fcon.title: Food Consumption Paste
c_fcon.desc: An organic confection that arrests hunger for a limited time.
c_fcon.flavor: Just because it's organic, doesn't mean it's good for you.

M_abix.title: Antibiotic Pill
M_abix.desc: A broad-spectrum antibacterial agent, protecting against food poisoning, wound infections and pneumonia.
M_abix.flavor: While not quite invincible, your susceptibility to microbial takeover will temporarily reach an all-time low.

a_leac.title: Leather Chest Armor
a_leac.desc: A basic cuirass, gives limited insulation and damage protection

waters.title: Waterskin
waters.desc: A basic water bladder, not perfectly watertight.
waters.flavor: The waterskin's rough construction allows for rapid crafting, but loses water over time.

M_band.title: Basic Bandage
M_band.desc: Cloth bandages to stem bleeding and heal minor wounds.
M_band.flavor: The healing won't start until the bleeding stops.

vapcon.title: Vapor Condenser
vapcon.desc: Can be placed over Enzyme Geysers across Icarus to condense vapor into exotics or condensed enzymes. WARNING: Attracts creatures while active.
vapcon.flavor: Pretty high tech, considering it was created on planet.

al_bea.title: Aluminium Beam
al_bea.desc: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
al_bea.flavor: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

torwal.title: Wall Torch
torwal.desc: A mounted flame for adorning shelter walls.
torwal.flavor: Lower oxygen levels produce a dirty, but workable flame.

t_opkx.title: Stone Pickaxe
t_opkx.flavor: The soft sedimentary rock scattered across Icarus's surface is easily shaped into useful tools. They may not be durable, but can be repaired easily enough.

bedrol.title: Bedroll
bedrol.desc: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.
bedrol.flavor: 'A bed is where the soul returns after a night's travelling' ~ Russian folk saying

wcratm.title: Medium Wood Crate
wcratm.desc: Store, share and protect items and resources.

wo_hps.title: Wood Halfpieces
wo_hps.desc: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
wo_hps.flavor: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

t_okni.title: Stone Knife
t_okni.desc: A basic hunting tool, strong and sharp enough ... just.
t_okni.flavor: Icarus's unusually active tectonics provide a ready source of sedimentary rocks, making for easily knapped, sharp, but weak blades.

al_rhf.title: Aluminium Halfpitches
al_rhf.flavor: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

c_obuf.title: Oxygen Buff Paste
c_obuf.desc: A natural concoction that increases available oxygen.
c_obuf.flavor: Your parents are a long way from here. What you do with your body is your business.

t_shot.title: Shotgun
t_shot.desc: The reliable and timeless pump-action, savage at short range.

M_apop.title: Anti-poison Paste
M_apop.desc: A basic toxicology and anti-venom kit to reduce the effects of poisoning.
M_apop.flavor: It's speculated that exotics may suffuse much of the plant life in the terrazone, imparting bioactive properties, though exactly what these are, whether they're safe, and exactly how it works ... at this stage, who knows?

t_tham.title: Titanium Hammer
t_tham.desc: A durable and reliable tool for structure repair.
t_tham.flavor: Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.

oxybla.title: Oxygen Bladder
oxybla.desc: A simple airtight vessel for storing extra oxygen.

st_sta.title: Stone Stairs
st_sta.desc: Stairs that may last longer than you.

wo_rhf.title: Wood Halfpitches
wo_rhf.flavor: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

compos.title: Biofuel Composter
compos.desc: Rapidly decomposes organic matter into biofuel, which is collected by adding a biofuel can. Can be connected to a water network for increased processing speed.
compos.flavor: Requires a fuel can to be added to collect biofuel.

a_furc.title: Fur Chest Armor
a_furc.desc: An armored fur jacket, giving warmth and reasonable damage protection.

eheatl.title: Heavy Heater
eheatl.desc: A powered heating device for warming larger areas.

s_chem.title: Chemistry Bench
s_chem.flavor: Unlikely to win anyone a Nobel Prize, but sufficient for the average Icarus alchemist.

t_cspe.title: Carbon Spear
t_cspe.desc: A light, resilient spear made of layered carbon fiber.

t3base.title: Machining Bench
t3base.desc: Upgrades your manufacturing abilities with basic machine tools.

oxytan.title: Oxygen Tank
oxytan.desc: A small tank for storing and consuming oxygen.
oxytan.flavor: While plants and animals were genetically adjusted to deal with the impurities in Icarus's air, humans need to bring their own.

gl_ram.title: Glass Roof
gl_ram.desc: A transparent roof piece or ramp.
gl_ram.flavor: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

co_hps.title: Concrete Halfpieces
co_hps.desc: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
co_hps.flavor: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

a_clol.title: Cloth Leg Armor
a_clol.desc: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

st_trf.title: Stone Floor Trapdoor
st_trf.desc: Stone floor with space for a trapdoor.

p_abon.title: Bone Arrow
p_abon.desc: A primitive arrow, dealing greater damage than flint or stone.
p_abon.flavor: In the mid-22nd century, the fletchers art is being rediscovered on Icarus.

t_pspe.title: Platinum Spear
t_pspe.desc: Priceless on Earth. A projectile on Icarus.
t_pspe.flavor: A midweight, short-shafted ahlspeiss spear that, composition aside, would not have looked out of place in 16th century Prussia.

refrig.title: Refrigerator
refrig.desc: Preserves food from spoilage when powered.
refrig.flavor: The Xigo-designed Skift fridge maintains an optimum four degrees.

wo_trd.title: Wood Trapdoor
wo_trd.flavor: Attaches to a floor trapdoor structure.

dehumi.title: Dehumidifier
dehumi.desc: Powerful, portable protection against the effects of being underground.
dehumi.flavor: Powered by charcoal, the dehumidifier heavily reduces bacterial growth in caves by reducing dampness.

M_apat.title: Anti-parasitic Tonic
M_apat.desc: A medicinal preparation for curing festering wounds.
M_apat.flavor: From suppurating wounds to dysentery, this natural broad-spectrum antibiotic remedy cures it all.

al_ram.title: Aluminium Roof/Ramp
al_ram.desc: A lightweight sheet aluminium ramp or roofing sheet.
al_ram.flavor: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

M_spli.title: Splint
M_spli.desc: Speeds the healing of a broken leg.

st_doo.title: Reinforced Door
st_doo.desc: A heavy wooden door reinforced with iron bracing.
st_doo.flavor: Once your structure has a doorway, this heavy door can be attached.

t_taxe.title: Titanium Axe
t_taxe.desc: A savagely sharp, extremely durable hand axe.

kiastg.title: Advanced Kitchen Storage
kiastg.desc: The best cabinets this planet can offer.

iw_ram.title: Interior Wood Ramp
iw_ram.desc: A light ramp, best used internally.
iw_ram.flavor: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

t_skni.title: Steel Knife
t_skni.flavor: Finely balanced knives like this can be thrown accurately with a little practice.

t_ikni.title: Iron Knife
t_ikni.desc: A short, clip-point blade for better defense and swifter skinning.
t_ikni.flavor: 'A mind all logic is like a knife all blade. It makes the hand bleed that uses it.' -- Rabindranath Tagore

p_acom.title: Composite Arrow
p_acom.desc: For power and weight, nothing compares.

s_earm.title: Electric Armor Bench
s_earm.desc: Powered workbench for advanced armor tooling and production.

stpile.title: Stone Pile
stpile.flavor: A time honored solution for storing rubble, stone and debris.

iw_trf.title: Interior Wood Floor Trapdoor
iw_trf.desc: An interior floorpiece with a hole for a trapdoor.

jamber.title: Berry Jam
jamber.flavor: It's not just jam. You hold in your hand an irreducible symbol of humanity's commitment to settling an alien world. Strongly increases max stamina.

icupbo.title: Interior Wood Cupboard
icupbo.desc: A place to keep items, gear and the rest.

blceil.title: Basic Ceiling Light
blceil.desc: A ceiling-mounted lamp, providing wide illumination, needing power.
blceil.flavor: "We forgive children who are afraid of the dark. The tragedy is adults afraid of the light." - Plato

s_glas.title: Glassworking Bench
s_glas.desc: Tools for creating glass items and construction elements.
s_glas.flavor: True glass-making originated in the Indus Valley in 1700 BCE, passing into the Mediterranean, then Africa and the rest of the world, before extending through space to Icarus in the mid 22nd century.

p_bste.title: Steel Bolt
p_bste.desc: A hard-hitting steel bolt, trading distance for damage.
p_bste.flavor: Roughly 64,000 years since its first invention, the essential form of the arrow remains unchanged.

wo_rai.title: Wood Railing
wo_rai.desc: A rough, but serviceable wooden railing.

al_trf.title: Aluminium Floor Trapdoor
al_trf.desc: Rough sheet aluminium flooring with an access hole.
al_trf.flavor: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

lanter.title: Lantern
lanter.desc: A portable, biofuel-powered light, refueled by the composter.

al_hps.title: Aluminium Halfpieces
al_hps.desc: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
al_hps.flavor: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

p_afli.title: Flint Arrow
p_afli.desc: Flies further, hits harder than stone.
p_afli.flavor: Knappable flint provides a sharper arrowhead and greater penetration than stone.

co_wan.title: Concrete Wall Angled
co_wan.desc: Moulded inserts for gables and other angular constructions..

a_comf.title: Composite Feet Armor
a_comf.desc: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
a_comf.flavor: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

beapor.title: Portable Beacon
beapor.desc: Displays a map marker when deployed.
beapor.flavor: Lightly mapped and largely unexplored, human markers on the surface of Icarus are few and far between. The beacon offers a BYO solution.

dryrac.title: Drying Rack
dryrac.desc: A rack for slowly drying various cuts of meat

wo_wal.title: Wood Wall
wo_wal.desc: A roughly made wall, window or doorway (Hold 'R' for variants).
wo_wal.flavor: Wood structures withstand light storms without damage. Can be repaired with a repair hammer.

th_trd.title: Thatch Trapdoor
th_trd.flavor: Attaches to a thatch floor trapdoor.

R_stic.title: Stick
R_stic.desc: Small branches, easily fashioned into basic tools.
R_stic.flavor: Whether making weapons or tools, a crafting bench or fuel, basic creation begins with the humble stick.

a_leaa.title: Leather Arms Armor
a_leaa.desc: Gauntlets, providing basic protection and insulation.

a_polh.title: Polar Bear Head
a_polh.desc: The head of a polar bear, can be crafted into a deployable trophy to hang on your wall.

gl_bea.title: Glass Beam
gl_bea.desc: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
gl_bea.flavor: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

iw_sta.title: Interior Wood Stairs
iw_sta.desc: A set of stairs designed for interior use.

s_anvi.title: Anvil Bench
s_anvi.desc: Heavyweight work surface for iron and steel tools, using ingots smelted in their appropriate furnaces.
s_anvi.flavor: Arguably the simplest fabrication system known to humanity.

al_lad.title: Aluminium Ladder
al_lad.desc: A sturdy metal ladder for climbing.

jargla.title: Glass Jar
jargla.desc: A roughly made, but perfectly serviceable mason jar.
jargla.flavor: This jar is empty, but like the many gaps in our understanding of this planet, is waiting to be filled.

co_rco.title: Concrete Roof Corner
co_rco.desc: A strong insert for angled roofs.

wo_ram.title: Wood Roof/Ramp
wo_ram.desc: A basic wooden ramp or roof.
wo_ram.flavor: A ramp or a roof, depending whose hands this element is in. Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

al_wal.title: Aluminium Wall
al_wal.flavor: Cycle for other construction variants. Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

th_rhf.title: Thatch Halfpitches
th_rhf.flavor: A two-part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

wtable.title: Wood Table
wtable.desc: A wooden table, like so many before it.
wtable.flavor: It's possible that the entirety of human culture can be extrapolated from the existence of tables.

extele.title: Electric Extractor
extele.desc: A portable, powered mining unit powered by electricity for extracting exotics deposits.
extele.flavor: For all your exotic mining needs.

t_oaxe.title: Stone Axe
t_oaxe.desc: A roughly-made axe, but fells trees well enough.
t_oaxe.flavor: The first step on a path that leads back to the 22nd century.

s_repa.title: Repair Bench
s_repa.desc: Repair any Item Crafted on Other Benches
s_repa.flavor: A Specialized Bench which allows you to Repair Items Crafted on any Bench

oxitem.title: Metal Oxite Dissolver
oxitem.desc: A faster and more efficient, biofuel-powered oxidizer with greater storage.

c_sbuf.title: Stamina Buff Paste
c_sbuf.desc: A herbal concoction, temporarily increasing stamina.
c_sbuf.flavor: While lacking some of the pharmaceutical refinements, this paste produces similar physiological affects to the 'wakers' once offered to long haul space pilots.

M_abit.title: Antibiotic Tonic
M_abit.desc: An antibacterial distillation that cures food poisoning, wound infections and afflictions like pneumonia.
M_abit.flavor: The interaction between bioactive substances and microbial life here on Icarus is still poorly understood, especially when one factors in the effects of exotic matter to both.

s_kitc.title: Kitchen Bench
s_kitc.desc: A modular workspace for cooking and concocting complex recipes.
s_kitc.flavor: Prep advanced food recipes here to assist on your adventures

s_croi.title: Iron Crop Plot
s_croi.desc: A sturdy option for farming with water intake for faster crop growth. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
s_croi.flavor: Can be connected to a water network

wine.title: Wine
wine.flavor: You're four billion kilometers from Earth, but some things never change. Wine stops the pain, increases stamina and heath regen.

a_leah.title: Leather Head Armor
a_leah.desc: Headgear, providing some insulation and damage protection.

torflo.title: Floor Torch
torflo.desc: A free-standing torch requiring sticks for fuel.
torflo.flavor: Oxygen levels may be a little lower, but fire provides light well enough.

p_biro.title: Iron Bolt
p_biro.desc: A hard-hitting iron arrow, trading distance for damage.
p_biro.flavor: Roughly 64,000 years since its first invention, the essential form of the arrow remains unchanged.

s_mas4.title: Electric Masonry Bench
s_mas4.desc: Powered bench for heavy stonework and carving.

a_clof.title: Cloth Feet Armor
a_clof.desc: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

M_apap.title: Anti-parasitic Paste
M_apap.desc: A medical preparation for reducing the effects of festering wounds.
M_apap.flavor: From the very first, newcomers to Icarus noted the medicinal and bioactive properties of Earth-type plants were significantly more intense.

kiasin.title: Advanced Kitchen Sink
kiasin.desc: Fully plumbed basin and running water, a luxury of sorts.

p_atit.title: Titanium Arrow
p_atit.flavor: Whether on Icarus or Earth, hunters continue to value skills for stealth, control and intimacy of the kill.

p_aalu.title: Aluminium Arrow
p_aalu.desc: A mid-grade, lightweight arrow giving decent range and damage.

wsprin.title: Water Sprinkler
wsprin.flavor: Must be connected to a water source.

s_mort.title: Mortar and Pestle
s_mort.desc: A simple tool for crafting resins, pastes, medicines and more.
s_mort.flavor: The tool of chefs, herbalists, apothecaries and alchemists.

gl_wan.title: Glass Wall Angled
gl_wan.desc: Angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

m_douf.title: Flatbread Dough
m_douf.desc: Makes flatbread, just add to a fire.

a_furh.title: Fur Head Armor
a_furh.desc: Heavy, warm and moderately protective headgear.

c_ores.title: Oxygen Restoration Paste
c_ores.desc: An organic co-factor that rapidly restores oxygen.

st_bea.title: Stone Beam
st_bea.desc: Anchors structures to the ground for much higher building.
st_bea.flavor: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor. Increasing the quantity of beams at lower levels will increase build height further.

co_rhf.title: Concrete Halfpitches
co_rhf.flavor: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

st_ram.title: Stone Roof/Ramp
st_ram.desc: A sturdy stone ramp or roof to resist the elements.

t4base.title: Fabricator
t4base.flavor: Surprisingly simple for such a versatile machine, the Fabricator combines a flatbed CNC router with limited 3D alloy printing capabilities.

m_bloo.title: Steel Bloom
m_bloo.desc: A precursor mixture of iron ore and coal, smelted in a concrete furnace to create steel.
m_bloo.flavor: The conditions on Icarus give its would-be metallurgists very little control over the finer details of steel smelting. A basic bloomery process prevails.

m_epox.title: Epoxy
m_epox.desc: A basic but strong and hard-setting organic polymer.
m_epox.flavor: UDA safety guidelines recommend not breathing in the fumes.

s_fure.title: Electric Furnace
s_fure.desc: A laboratory grade arc furnace, smelts basic and advanced materials alike.

torwoo.title: Wood Torch
torwoo.desc: A longer burning source of light in the darkness.
torwoo.flavor: 'One thing about wearing a helmet, you don't notice your shack smells like Satan's armpit.' ~ Sol Berlinski. (Activate with secondary attack.)

th_trf.title: Thatch Floor Trapdoor
th_trf.desc: An easily crafted floorpiece with a hole for a trapdoor.

s_armo.title: Textiles Bench
s_armo.desc: Craft and assemble various protective items and garments.
s_armo.flavor: Basic fabric, leatherwork and armorer's tools allow you to fashion a range of clothing and protective wear from natural materials and fibres.

dmdele.title: Electric Deep-Mining Drill
dmdele.desc: A convenient drilling device that runs on electricity.

M_apox.title: Anti-poison Pill
M_apox.desc: An long-acting anti-venom to prevent poisoning.

M_apot.title: Anti-poison Tonic
M_apot.flavor: Of the many ways to die on Icarus, poisoning is perhaps the least glorious.

a_hunl.title: Hunter Leg Armor
a_hunl.desc: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
a_hunl.flavor: Take the effort out of hunting.

th_flo.title: Thatch Floor
th_flo.desc: A lightweight, quickly crafted floor piece.
th_flo.flavor: Simple to craft and plentiful, thatch construction provides rapid shelter to those on the move, or in need of rapid, if not particularly durable protection.

t_taxi.title: Taxidermy Knife
t_taxi.desc: A small, strong precision cutting tool.
t_taxi.flavor: Perfect for precise cuts to preserve that 'still breathing' look.

M_apax.title: Anti-parasitic Pill
M_apax.desc: A potent antibacterial preparation for preventing festering wounds.
M_apax.flavor: Flooding your body with antibiotics is a double-edged sword, but if it stops you needing to use the word 'festering' to describe part of your body, it's worth it.

t_psic.title: Platinum Sickle
t_psic.desc: An extremely precise, high yield harvesting tool.
t_psic.flavor: A proletariat icon made from a near-priceless material, yet no more valuable than lead when compared to exotics themselves.

compow.title: Wood Composter
compow.desc: Change your trash into Fertilizer with this simple composter. Items placed in this device will spoil at an accelerated rate.

waterb.title: Water Bomb
waterb.desc: A thrown device for fire fighting.
waterb.flavor: Woven from fiber, the water bomb allows fire suppression from a safe distance.

beer.title: Beer
beer.desc: Proving you can brew beer from just about anything.
beer.flavor: Warms the body, soothes the soul, increases regeneration rates.

al_flo.title: Aluminium Floor
al_flo.desc: Lightweight but resilient sheet aluminium flooring.
al_flo.flavor: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

p_afir.title: Fire Arrow
p_afir.flavor: 'One of the good things about being this far from Earth, there's no-one to tell you not to play with fire.' - Sol Berlinski

t_tkni.title: Titanium Knife
t_tkni.desc: A blade as hard and lightweight as life itself.
t_tkni.flavor: Named for the Greek Titans, titanium is harder than steel, corrosion resistant and extremely light. Its only flaw is brittleness, meaning it falls short of its indestructible reputation.

t_iham.title: Iron Hammer
t_iham.desc: Maintain structures against the wrath of Icarus.
t_iham.flavor: Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.

thermo.title: Thermos
thermo.desc: Like a Canteen, but with better thermal protection

campfi.title: Campfire
campfi.desc: A place to cook food and fend the cold away.
campfi.flavor: One of the simplest sources of heat available on Icarus, the campfire burns sticks and wood to cook basic foods. Toxins in the planet's atmosphere do not interfere with combustion.

p_bpla.title: Platinum Bolt
p_bpla.flavor: Though eclipsed by exotics, platinum remains extremely valuable, even if the market is somewhat distant.

al_win.title: Aluminium Window
al_win.flavor: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

th_sta.title: Thatch Stairs
th_sta.flavor: Simple to craft and plentiful, thatch construction provides rapid shelter to those on the move, or in need of rapid, if not especially durable protection.

t2base.title: Crafting Bench
t2base.desc: A sturdy construction bench, though useless without shelter.
t2base.flavor: A heavy woodworking table that enables construction of improved tools, weapons and structural elements.

wo_wan.title: Wood Wall Angled
wo_wan.desc: Angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

al_sta.title: Aluminium Stairs
al_sta.flavor: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.
